name: video-downloader-bot
description: Telegram bot to download videos from Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Twitter/X, Pinterest, Likee

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p bin && curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp_linux -o bin/yt-dlp && chmod +x bin/yt-dlp && curl -L https://github.com/mikf/gallery-dl/releases/latest/download/gallery-dl.bin -o bin/gallery-dl && chmod +x bin/gallery-dl
